items.title: Malaysia Part Of New Asean Fertiliser Alliance For Food Security
items.summary: Indonesia, Malaysia, and Brunei have formed a new Southeast Asia Fertiliser Association (Seafa) to boost food security, with Indonesia serving as the inaugural chairman and Malaysia (represented by Petronas Chemicals Group Berhad) as co-chairman. The post Malaysia Part Of New Asean Fertiliser Alliance For Food Security appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Probe Denial Of Overtime Allowance For Paramedics, Ambulance Drivers: Ex-Senator
items.summary: Ex-senator Dr RA Lingeshwaran asks why paramedics and ambulance drivers are denied payment of overtime allowance or replacement leave, even though MOH says support staff are eligible for these entitlements if they're instructed "in writing" to be on-call. The post Probe Denial Of Overtime Allowance For Paramedics, Ambulance Drivers: Ex-Senator appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Smartphone Apps Are Changing How We Study Everyday Brain Activity
items.summary: Natural EEGs can support long-term monitoring outside hospitals for people with neurological disorders, and help others track health issues such as fatigue, workload stress, or flagging attention during routine activities. The post Smartphone Apps Are Changing How We Study Everyday Brain Activity appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: No Extension For Contract Pharmacists, Applications Open End 2027: MOH
items.summary: MOH says there are no contract extensions for over 40 pharmacists who lost their jobs last Saturday because they reached their max 5-year contract duration. They may reapply in more than one and a half year's time when permanent recruitment opens end 2027. The post No Extension For Contract Pharmacists, Applications Open End 2027: MOH appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: When The System Fails Young Doctors: Lessons From HTA Housemen Scam — Clinician
items.summary: It sounds like common sense not to transfer money to a personal account for official payments. But this is a profound misunderstanding of what it's like to be a houseman in Malaysia, where questioning instructions is seen as defiance. "Just follow first". The post When The System Fails Young Doctors: Lessons From HTA Housemen Scam — Clinician appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: First Sarawakian Woman Elected Malaysian Society Of Parasitology And Tropical Medicine President
items.summary: Adela's election places her at the head of a national scientific society at a time when Malaysia continues to strengthen research capability, public health preparedness and international scientific visibility. The post First Sarawakian Woman Elected Malaysian Society Of Parasitology And Tropical Medicine President appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Provide Transition For Contract Pharmacists Pending Permanent Appointments — MPS
items.summary: Consider interim contract extensions for affected pharmacists, pending the issuance of formal appointment letters, to prevent disruption of services and avoid premature workforce attrition. Many of the affected pharmacists have served for several years. The post Provide Transition For Contract Pharmacists Pending Permanent Appointments — MPS appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Dental Officers’ Contracts Ending Today Without Permanent Appointments — MDA
items.summary: Contracts for the 2021 contract dental officer cohort are set to end today (April 6), July 11, and Sept, without clear direction on permanent appointments or extensions. These dentists have contributed to service delivery in the public health care system. The post Dental Officers’ Contracts Ending Today Without Permanent Appointments — MDA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Doctors’ Groups Demand Internal Inquiry Into Housemen Scam, Victim Compensation
items.summary: MMA and HDK want an internal inquiry into the HTA housemen scam to address structural weaknesses that allowed the crime to occur in the workplace, beyond a police probe. The doctors' groups demand compensation for the 190 victims who suffered RM47k losses. The post Doctors’ Groups Demand Internal Inquiry Into Housemen Scam, Victim Compensation appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: HTA Sacks Admin Assistant, Reports Massive Housemen Scam To Police
items.summary: Tunku Azizah Hospital says it has sacked an admin assistant, a MyStep staff who allegedly scammed about 190 housemen out of over RM47,000, and filed a police report, stressing that collection of cash or payments to staff's personal accounts isn't allowed. The post HTA Sacks Admin Assistant, Reports Massive Housemen Scam To Police appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Former Johor property executive pleads not guilty to RM1m CBT charges
